CREATE TABLE test_decimal (value String, scale UInt8);
SELECT toDecimal64OrZero(value, scale) AS result, toTypeName(result) FROM test_decimal;
SELECT toDecimal64OrZero(toString(SUM(value)), 2) AS total FROM (SELECT value FROM test_decimal WHERE scale = 2);
SELECT t.value, toDecimal64OrZero(t.value, 4) AS decimal_value FROM (SELECT '0.999999999999999999' AS value) t;
SELECT toDecimal64OrZero(toString(column1), 3) FROM (SELECT 10 AS column1) AS t;
SELECT toDecimal64OrZero(toString(123456789), 5) AS decimal_value1, toDecimal64OrZero(toString('98765432101234567890'), 1) AS decimal_value2;
SELECT CASE WHEN toDecimal64OrZero('wrong_format', 2) = 0 THEN 'Conversion Error' ELSE toDecimal64OrZero('wrong_format', 2) END AS conversion_test;
SELECT DISTINCT toDecimal64OrZero(toString(value), scale) AS unique_values FROM test_decimal WHERE scale <= 3;
